name: Waldine's Black-Eyed Peas Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 large green pepper; chopped or half green and half red
1 can Rotel Chiles & Tomatoes; drain, save liquid
1 lb Smokey Hollow Pork Sausage; cut into 1/2-inch rings
2 chicken breasts; skin and bone, cubed
2 cans Black-eyed Peas; drained, save liquid, or 1 package Frozen black-eyed peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Save any leftover meats in the freezer and add them to the pot.
2. Place rice in the pot and add remaining ingredients. Stir to mix.
3. Cut butter into pats and place on top.
4. In a 4-cup measuring cup, combine soup, tomato juice, black-eyed pea juice (and any other juice you are using), plus enough water to make 4 cups. Pour over rice mixture plus 1 more cup.
5. Cook until liquid is absorbed and rice is tender but still a little moist.
